system.flavor: You slash, and phantom images of your blade linger over your shoulder.
system.effect:
Stance keen and six lingering lightning infused copies of your weapon, represented by a power die, starting at 6.
• At the end of your turn you may tick down the die to fire a weapon at one or two foes in range 1-4, dealing 1 piercing damage and ticking the die down by 1 each time.
• The last sword deals an extra 1d6 piercing.
• If the die ticks to 0, exit this stance.
Isolate you end your turn with no other characters adjacent, regain two swords.
Isolate may fire 1d3 swords at a foe instead if they are isolated.
